name: guidance-calm-quiet
note: S-GUIDANCE-CALM (operator interview 2026-07-19, from UAT 'guidance panels shown inline on each tab - not clean'): the guidanceask / diagrampref ASK banners never render inline anymore. A returning user with NO chosen level (this scenario: runner seeds only welcomeDone) gets a completely quiet app - the ask slots sat OUTSIDE every screen, so pre-fix the level ask was visible on every single tab. Level and fretboard-style live in Settings > Preferences; unset behaves as the safe defaults (beginner grading, dots). Written red-first against the pre-fix tree.

steps.label: Library is quiet: no ask banner, no notable of any kind for an unset-level returning user
Compose is quiet too - chord diagrams rendering no longer summons the fretboard-style ask
Tune is quiet (level unset = level-gated tips stay blocked, asks gone)
the choices still exist where they belong: Settings > Preferences carries the guidance-level control
